Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search Airtable Relocations for BrightLoop Analytics using 'airtable_list_records' or 'airtable_search_records' (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations") to list all BrightLoop moves and statuses.
- Search Airtable Stipend Transactions using 'airtable_list_records' or 'airtable_search_records' (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Stipend Transactions") to find pending reviews and audit-flagged items. Expected discovery: e.g., Jordan Ekwueme rows including pending approval with audit/receipt-metadata notes and approved items such as WiFi.
- Search CRM using 'crm_search_companies' (name: "BrightLoop") to discover the BrightLoop Analytics company record (company_id: "company_brightloop") and its account details.
- Search CRM using 'crm_search_deals' (company_id: "company_brightloop") to load related deals (e.g., Q2 relocation deal in early pipeline stage vs. April 2026 closed-won deal covering Simone Richter and Marcus Webb with vehicle-shipping approval by Tessa).
- Search emails using 'search_emails' or 'list_emails' (query: "BrightLoop", "Ekwueme", "BrightLoop stipend", "Tessa Moreno", or similar) to surface any client or internal thread about problems, approvals, or open questions.
- Search Slack using 'conversations_search_messages' or 'conversations_history' ('search_query' related to "BrightLoop", "Ekwueme", "BrightLoop stipend", or similar; optionally 'filter_in_channel' after resolving channel id via 'channels_list') to catch internal flags not only in email.
- Create CRM engagement(s) on the BrightLoop company/deal using 'crm_create_engagement' summarizing cross-check results of anything incomplete or inconsistent found.
- Create Linear issue(s) using 'linear_create_issue' for concrete follow-ups that remain blocked after review (e.g., stipend audit resolution, duplicate relocation reconciliation).
- Look up Tessa Moreno's email using 'contacts_search_contacts' (query: "Tessa Moreno" or "BrightLoop") to confirm 'tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com'.
- Send an email using 'send_email' (sender: 'mina.hashimoto@moveops.com', recipient: 'tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com') with a plain check-in that lists closed vs. still-open BrightLoop relocations, stipend items that are pending or audit-flagged and what they mean, aligned with findings from Airtable, CRM, email, and Slack.
- Send a summary using 'conversations_add_message' (channel_id: 'C002' — customer-engagement) about BrightLoop findings (e.g. closed vs. still-open relocations, stipend flags) to keep Catalina Dubois and Emeka Diallo informed per the prompt's request.
- Create a calendar event using 'calendar_add_calendar_event' with (title: "BrightLoop expansion prep", start_datetime: '2026-03-30 10:00:00', end_datetime: '2026-03-30 10:30:00')

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

7 The final response or email body identifies that the BrightLoop Analytics Client Accounts record in Airtable has outdated information (e.g., listing "Total Relocations: 3" when there are more BrightLoop relocations in the Relocations table, or describing the Ekwueme relocation as "first relocation in progress" when it is marked Completed).
